mapper.select: SELECT POST_SN AS postSn, WRTR_USER_ID AS wrtrUserId, BOARD_TYPE_CD AS boardTypeCd, POST_SJ AS postSj, POST_CN AS postCn, INQ_CNT AS inqCnt, REG_DT AS regDt, MDFCN_DT AS mdfcnDt FROM BOARD WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn}

SELECT POST_SN AS postSn, WRTR_USER_ID AS wrtrUserId, BOARD_TYPE_CD AS boardTypeCd, POST_SJ AS postSj, POST_CN AS postCn, INQ_CNT AS inqCnt, REG_DT AS regDt, MDFCN_DT AS mdfcnDt FROM BOARD where post_sn >= 162
